zh.Chelmsford, Essex, England: 英國艾可傑爾姆斯福德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Darcy於1459年出生在英國艾可馬爾頓時，他的父親Sir Robert Darcy43歲，母親Elizabeth Tyrrell28歲。他於1477年與Lady Margaret Harleston在英國素福爾可結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1485年9月22日在英國艾可享年26歲，埋葬在英國艾可馬爾頓。

zh-hans.Chelmsford, Essex, England: 英国艾可傑爾姆斯福德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Darcy于1459年出生在英国艾可馬爾頓时，他的父亲Sir Robert Darcy43岁，母亲Elizabeth Tyrrell28岁。他于1477年与Lady Margaret Harleston在英国素福爾可结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1485年9月22日在英国艾可享年26岁，埋葬在英国艾可馬爾頓。

nameMeanings.name: Darcy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Eamon, Brendan, Eamonn, Maeve, Malachy, Niamh, Seamus.  French Gisele, Julien, Normand, Alain, Armand, Cecile, Clemence, Dominique, Emile, Gilles, Jean-Paul, Laure.
English (Lancashire) and Irish: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Arcy in Manche, France, with fused preposition d(e) ‘from’.

Irish: in Ireland, this is generally the Norman name (see 1 above), established in Meath by Sir William D'Arcy in the 1360s, but it was also adopted for Ó Dorchaidhe ‘descendant of the dark one’, from dorcha ‘dark, gloomy’, a Connacht name that fell together with the Norman surname, which was introduced by Sir William D'Arcy and Sir John D'Arcy, Chief Justiciar of Ireland in the 14th century.

variants.name: Darcey
meanings: English (of Norman origin) and Irish (Tipperary): variant of   Darcy  .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Darcy was born in 1459, in Maldon, Essex, England, his father, Sir Robert Darcy, was 43 and his mother, Elizabeth Tyrrell, was 28. He married Lady Margaret Harleston in 1477, in Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 22 September 1485, in Essex, England, at the age of 26, and was buried in Maldon, Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Darcy est né en 1459, à Maldon, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert Darcy, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Tyrrell, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Lady Margaret Harleston en 1477, à Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 22 septembre 1485, à Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 26 ans, et a été enterré à Maldon, Essex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Darcy 1459 in Maldon, Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert Darcy 43 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Tyrrell 28. Er hat 1477 in Suffolk, England Lady Margaret Harleston geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 22. September 1485 im Alter von 26 Jahren in Essex, England und wurde in Maldon, Essex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Darcy è nato il nel 1459 nel Maldon, Essex, England, il suo padre, Sir Robert Darcy, aveva 43 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Tyrrell, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Lady Margaret Harleston nel 1477, nel Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 22 settembre 1485, nel Essex, England, all'età di 26 anni, e fu sepolto a Maldon, Essex, England.

ja.Chelmsford, Essex, England: イギリスエセックスチェルムスフォード
ja.All Saints with St Peter Churchyard, Mal: イギリスエセックスマルドン
ja.Danbury, Essex, England: イギリスエセックスダンブリー
ja.Maldon, Essex, England: イギリスエセックスマルドン
ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Darcyが1459年にイギリスエセックスマルドンで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Darcyは43歳，母Elizabeth Tyrrellは28歳であった。1477年にイギリススフォルクでLady Margaret Harlestonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1485年9月22日にイギリスエセックスで26歳で死去し，イギリスエセックスマルドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Darcy(이)가 1459년 영국 에세스 맬던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert Darcy(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Tyrrell(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1477년 영국 수폴크에서 Lady Margaret Harleston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1485년 9월 22일 영국 에세스에서 26세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 에세스 맬던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Darcy nasceu em 1459, em Maldon, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert Darcy, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Tyrrell, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Margaret Harleston em 1477, em Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 22 de setembro de 1485, em Essex, Inglaterra, com 26 anos, e foi sepultado em Maldon, Essex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Darcy родился в 1459 г. в местности малдон, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Robert Darcy было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Tyrrell, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Margaret Harleston в 1477 г. в местности суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 22 сентября 1485 г. в местности эссекс, Англия в возрасте 26 лет и был похоронен в местности малдон, эссекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Darcy nació en 1459, en Maldon, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Robert Darcy, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Tyrrell, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Lady Margaret Harleston en 1477, en Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 22 de septiembre de 1485, en Essex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 26 años, y fue sepultado en Maldon, Essex, Inglaterra.
